ideation: This sequence aims to capture the playful and mischievous nature of a monkey.  The animation will involve both arms in a dynamic, yet coordinated movement, mimicking the actions of a monkey reaching out for something or playfully interacting with its environment.  The key is to create a sense of fluid motion and a touch of unpredictability, reflecting the monkey's agile and curious nature. We will use a combination of joint1 (roll) and joint2 (pitch) movements, along with wrist adjustments, to create a natural-looking sequence.  We’ll avoid perfectly symmetrical movements to enhance the playful aspect.

frames.beat: arms reach out playfully, a curious monkey
both arms swing inward, a quick playful grab
arms recoil and twist, a mischievous peek
arms settle, ready for the next playful move
